prompt_format: Join each prompt_lines array with newline characters to recover the complete prompt actually used for the final asset.

assets.visual_check: passed: exact title/subtitle and six illustrated explanation modules; no prohibited copy
prompt_lines: Asset type: 1:1 B2B ecommerce detail-page template preview

- Image 1 is a reference image ONLY for information architecture and text density: learn its strong large title, explanatory subtitle, central hero product, surrounding image modules, and readable English explanations. Do not copy any brand, logo, badge, numeric promise, "20+", "3-5 DAYS", or wording from Image 1.

- Image 2 is a reference image ONLY for the exact product identity: an unbranded deep navy six-panel structured baseball cap with curved brim, tonal stitching, plain crown, and adjustable metal back buckle. Do not copy Image 2's layout.

Create a genuinely information-dense square procurement overview for the plain navy cap. This must look like a finished Alibaba-international-style B2B detail-page infographic that a buyer can scan and compare, not a sparse moodboard. The main cap occupies about 40% of the canvas. Around it place SIX distinct modules, and every module must contain both a relevant photographic/technical image and its exact heading plus exact explanation. Show all of these visual subjects: cap multi-angle views, fabric/stitch/buckle details, real commuting/outdoor/event scenes, neutral color variants, a neutral human quality-check action, and generic protective packing/carton flow. Effective information content should fill roughly 85% of the canvas while retaining clean gutters.
Warm off-white background, crisp white or very pale-gray module cards, thin warm-orange separators and callout dots, deep navy headings/body typography, modern editorial grid.

One consistent unbranded deep navy cotton-twill structured six-panel baseball cap as the central hero. Its crown must remain completely blank. Supporting photos must be realistic and visually self-explanatory.
Photorealistic commercial product, lifestyle, inspection and packing photography integrated into a precise high-density infographic; premium wholesale catalog quality; no decorative filler.

Square 1:1. Top header contains title and subtitle. Center hero cap is large but only about 40%. Arrange two image+text modules on the left, two on the right, and two wide image+text modules across the bottom. At least six clearly bounded image modules total. Use different crops and responsibilities, not repeated thumbnails. Keep all text away from edges and make it large enough to read at 1024px.
Render these strings VERBATIM, with normal spaces and spelling, exactly once each. These are the ONLY readable words permitted anywhere in the image:

Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif title; smaller clean sans-serif subtitle; compact uppercase module headings; readable regular-weight explanations. The finished image must contain at least 30 correctly rendered English words from the exact copy above. Do not invent filler text or pseudo-labels.

At least six labels and six explanations; at least five modules with distinct images (target all six); all exact copy readable and correctly paired; product identity consistent; main cap blank and unbranded; high-density yet ordered; warm orange only as an accent. No brand, no logo, no customer logo, no watermark, no certification or certification icon, no certificate, no test report, no MOQ, no lead time, no price, no percentage, no dimensions, no capacity, no production quantity, no performance number, no dates, no superlative claim.

Any text other than the fourteen exact strings; BOFITCAP; MOUNTAIN ADVENTURE; FINE CAP CO.; URBAN EXPLORER; 20+; OEM; ODM; DAYS; ISO; BSCI; malformed typography; gibberish; microtext; fake logos; embroidered mark on the cap; empty decorative cards; many small pictures without explanations; duplicated layouts; distorted hands, caps, factories, cartons, or sewing.

assets.visual_check: passed: six matching angles and detail modules with readable copy
prompt_lines: Asset type: square B2B ecommerce detail-page template preview

Input images: Image 1 is only the information-architecture and text-density reference: learn its prominent title, useful subtitle, central hero product, surrounding image modules and readable explanations, but copy none of its brand, logo, numbers or promises. Image 2 is only the approved product and supply-chain identity plus minimum density anchor: keep the same plain deep navy six-panel structured baseball cap, warm off-white background and restrained warm-orange accents, but create a completely different layout.

Primary request: Build an information-dense multi-angle product introduction. Show front, side, back, top, interior and macro detail views of the same unbranded cap so the physical relationship of crown, brim, eyelets, sweatband and metal buckle is immediately clear.
Style/medium: photorealistic commercial product photography integrated with precise catalog callouts and technical line connectors.

Composition/framing: 1:1; large three-quarter hero cap uses about 40% of the canvas; arrange six distinct image-plus-text modules in an orbital multi-angle grid around it; content fills about 85%; clean gutters; no repeated view.
Text: render these strings verbatim, exactly once each, and render no other readable words:
"A clear view of form, structure and functional components"
Typography: bold condensed uppercase title, clean sans-serif subtitle, compact uppercase module labels, clearly readable explanations.

Constraints: at least six labels, at least six image modules with one explanation each, at least thirty correctly rendered English words, main visual between 35% and 50%, effective content about 85%, exact cap identity across every view. No brand or customer logo, watermark, certificate or certification symbol, test report, numeric specification, quantity, production figure, price, schedule, performance score, superlative, or extra text.
Avoid: Image 1 branding and promises, fake writing, gibberish, microtext, dimension values, duplicate angles, warped brim, disconnected buckle, empty cards.
